title: Automation of system files management using Gen AI
description: Implement an automated system for managing system files leveraging Generative AI technology to enhance efficiency and accuracy.
business_case_summary:
Business Case Summary: Automation of system files management using Gen AI (DEM-2026-0096)

Executive Summary  
This project aims to implement Generative AI to automate system files management, improving operational efficiency and reducing manual errors. The solution will streamline file handling processes across infrastructure systems.

Business Value/Impact  
Automation will enhance accuracy and speed, leading to cost savings and better resource allocation. It will also improve system reliability by minimizing human intervention in routine file management tasks.

Risk Mitigation  
Medium-level risks will be addressed through phased deployment and continuous monitoring. Comprehensive testing and fallback mechanisms will ensure system stability during implementation.
